project.name: Hero: The Inmotion V12S: When Your Commuter Wheel Gets a Touchscreen

data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, speech bubbles, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition filling the entire frame.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective cyan and amber neon accents. Urban city street at dusk, wet pavement reflecting neon signs. In the middle distance, a silhouetted figure rides past on an electric unicycle - far enough that the wheel model is indistinct, just a person balanced on a single wheel in motion. City commuter energy, rainy evening atmosphere. Storefronts and street lights create depth. Focus on the urban environment and mood rather than the hardware.
